steps.t: A bucket of water can be found along the Greylin near Khadâsh-gâra. Nagli Want-kin has asked you to aid him in bathing his beloved aurochs, Lapis. You…
Nagli Want-kin can be found at Khadâsh-gâra in Elderslade. You have bathed Lapis and she seems to be very happy about it. You should talk to Nagli.
